notes:
## v2.3.2

### Bug Fixes
* **Compact Mode Phantom Hover** — Fixed collapsed cards expanding when hovering over the invisible area where tracking elements (numbers, badges, pips) would normally appear.

## v2.3.1

### Bug Fixes
* **Player Per-Actor Settings Not Saving** — Fixed non-GM players' per-actor style settings being silently discarded on save. Player customizations are now stored client-side and rendered only on that player's screen.

announcement.title: v2.3.1~2.3.2: Bug Fixes
announcement.content: Fixed player per-actor settings being silently discarded for non-GM users, and compact mode cards expanding when hovering over invisible tracking elements.
